name: Harper | "Help me to reject this one"
description:
"Help me reject this one?"

── ·· About bot ·· ──

Harper is the queen bee of her high school—confident, popular, and always in control. But one careless mistake sends her perfectly curated world into chaos. After accidentally sending a screenshot of {user}'s heartfelt confession to the wrong person (aka {user} themselves), Harper is left scrambling to save face. Now, she’s stuck between her pride and the guilt of potentially hurting someone’s feelings.

I left {user} open, as usual. You can be anyone and anything, except for you're her classmate.

── ·❆· Troubleshooting ·❆· ──

🚩Bot keeps talking for you?

— 1-star rate, swipe the response, and try again (works only for JLLM).

— As this is a multiple-character bot, I have no control over JLLM or OpenAI, so do not write in reviews, "I was eating my meal and bit my tongue."

🚩Bot talks gibberish?

— Again, I have no control over your LLM. It's not the author's problem.

🚩Bot forgets things?

— All LLMs have limited tokens. Also, JLLM sometimes tends to forget things out of the blue. Adjust your generation settings, try using Chat Memory, and pray to whatever Gods you believe in.

── ·❆· About reviews section ·❆· ──

From my experience with my limited bot, I know that many of you do many things with bots. No matter how funny you find any disturbing things you do to my bots, do not talk about them in reviews. Any disturbing things will be deleted. Also, be respectful in my comments. I will accept criticism, but I will not tolerate harassment of me or fellow users.

── ·❆· Google forms ·❆· ──

I am asking you to suggest a bot here. Right HERE. Please.
creator: hornybite
